caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is centered against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved tunic featuring a decorative embroidered neckline and a dark bead necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a small circular logo is accompanied by the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands. Initially, her eyes are closed and her hands are held close to her body. As the sequence progresses, she opens her eyes and begins to move her hands outward in expressive gestures to emphasize her speech. Her facial expression remains focused and professional as she talks, with her mouth opening and closing in coordination with her speech.
